notableEvents.label: Trevor Story reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Story reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Zach McKinstry. Wilyer Abreu to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela grounds into a double play, second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to shortstop Kevin McGonigle to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Trevor Story out at 2nd. Ceddanne Rafaela out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
